name: DNA Ligation (T4 Ligase)

components.name: Linearized vector
components.note: 去磷酸化可降低自连背景

components.name: Insert DNA
components.note: 摩尔比 vector:insert = 1:3–1:5 (粘性末端) 或 1:5–1:10 (平末端)

components.name: 10× T4 Ligase Buffer
components.note: 含 ATP, 勿反复冻融

components.name: 2a. 粘性末端：室温 10 min 或 16°C 过夜
2b. 平末端：16°C 过夜（或室温 2 h 用高浓度酶）
4. 转化 2–5 µL 连接产物

notes.en: Controls: (1) no ligase → assess background; (2) no insert → assess vector self-ligation; (3) uncut vector → assess transformation efficiency. Insert calculation: ng insert = (ng vector × insert bp / vector bp) × molar ratio. Quick Ligation Kit (NEB) completes in 5 min.
notes.zh: 对照组：(1) 无连接酶对照 → 评估自连背景; (2) 无 insert 对照 → 评估载体自连; (3) 未切 vector 对照 → 评估转化效率。Insert 计算公式：ng insert = (ng vector × insert bp / vector bp) × molar ratio。Quick Ligation Kit (NEB) 可 5 min 完成。

ref: Sambrook & Russell (2001) Molecular Cloning; NEB T4 DNA Ligase protocol

materials.name: Insert DNA (purified PCR product or restriction fragment)

usage.en: Ligate DNA insert into linearized vector using T4 DNA ligase.
usage.zh: T4 DNA 连接酶将 DNA 插入片段连接到线性化载体中。
